name.en-US: On the First and Second Decretals
name.la: Expositio Super Primam et Secundam Decretalem

description.en-US: Aquinas's exposition of two decretals (papal letters) of Innocent III, on points of Trinitarian and christological doctrine.
description.la: Expositio Thomae duarum decretalium Innocentii III, de quaestionibus doctrinae Trinitariae et christologicae.

sources.description: Latin text from the Leonine / Marietti editions (public domain), mirrored from aquinas.cc.

title.en-US: I - On the Trinity and the Catholic Faith
title.la: I - On the Trinity and the Catholic Faith

title.en-US: II - On the Error of Joachim
title.la: II - On the Error of Joachim
